description_long: This playground features a large, ship-inspired multi-play structure set on a green base with a blue area simulating water. The structure is primarily constructed from light-colored wood and includes multiple platforms connected by bridges, stairs, and slides. Decorative string flags are strung above the play area, adding a festive touch. There are two prominent slides, one on each side, and several climbing and crawling features, including a tunnel and ladders. Safety barriers and railings are present along the elevated walkways and platforms. The design encourages imaginative play, climbing, sliding, and exploration for children.
description: A large, ship-themed wooden multi-play structure with slides, bridges, and safety railings, set on a green and blue base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main ship structure, central bridge, and both slides extending to the sides.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the length of the structure, the blue water-like area, and the symmetry of the slides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the rear platforms, stairs, and the tunnel entrance.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the rear stairs, elevated platforms, and the overall depth of the play structure.
